title: DarknessPack
description: Discover rare Darkness Ore deep underground, smelt shards into ingots, forge Darkness Blocks, and empower gear via the Gemstone Anvil. Lightweight, late‑game fantasy progression with balanced worldgen and proper tool requirements.
body:
# **Darkness Pack - 1.20.1**

Darkness Pack expands the world of Minecraft with new progression systems, combat mechanics, and crafting opportunities - all wrapped in a mysterious, dark-themed atmosphere. Instead of overwhelming you with instant power, it introduces a gradual journey where every discovery feels earned and every upgrade matters.

## Key Features

- A new underground resource – rare and valuable, waiting to be uncovered by those willing to explore deeper than ever before.
- Advanced crafting progression – unlock a specialized workstation where weapons and equipment can be enhanced, upgraded, and customized.
- Gem-based upgrade system – insert mystical gems into your gear to shape its abilities and adapt your playstyle to different challenges.
- Accessories and curios – subtle but powerful items, seamlessly integrated with the Curios API, offering additional layers of character progression.
- New combat tools and mechanics – from unique melee options to ranged weapons and magical abilities, each designed to feel distinct and rewarding.

## Gameplay Experience

Darkness Pack focuses on player choice and discovery. Instead of providing a fixed path, it gives you the tools to experiment, combine upgrades, and uncover synergies between items and abilities. Progression is modular and flexible, letting you decide how deep into the darkness you want to venture.

## For Players Who…

This mod is designed for players who enjoy exploration, progression, and customization rather than rushing straight to end-game gear. If you like uncovering hidden mechanics, experimenting with different builds, and shaping your own adventure, Darkness Pack was made for you.
